market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Augustus raises $180 million to build a clearing bank for the AI and stablecoin era
articles.description: The firm, freshly valued at $1 billion, aims to replace legacy correspondent banking with always-on infrastructure that connects traditional payment systems and stablecoins.

articles.title: MoneyGram's CEO says blockchain works best when customers don't know it's there
articles.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo said that their blockchain strategy has evolved from early experimentation into a broader effort to modernize the company's global payments infrastructure.

articles.title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
articles.description: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

articles.title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
articles.description: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June

articles.title: Bluecore Energy raises $10M to build portable nuclear reactors on barges
articles.description: Maritime nuclear energy startup Bluecore Energy has raised $10 million in a pre-seed funding round led by Slauson & Co.

articles.title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
articles.description: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
articles.description: Morpho Midnight introduces fixed rates and defined maturities alongside Morpho Blue’s variable-rate lending markets.

articles.title: Jack Mallers steps down as XXI Capital CEO as Tether's plans to merge three bitcoin firms falls
articles.description: The proposed three-way merger between Twenty One Capital, Mallers' Strike, and Elektron Energy has been abandoned.

articles.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
articles.description: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.

articles.title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms may exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
articles.description: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

articles.title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
articles.description: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

articles.title: Bitcoin rally has broad-based support as institutions, whales, options traders pile in
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 21, 2026

articles.title: Clarity odds jump to 43% on Polymarket after unverified reports Trump agreed to ethics deal
articles.description: Bettors moved the crypto market structure bill to a 43% chance of passing this year, up from a record low last week, though the reports remain unconfirmed and no bill text has appeared.

articles.title: 數學界天翻地覆，代數幾何 87 年懸案「雅可比猜想」遭 Claude 證偽
articles.description: 這一天，數學界發生驚天動地大事，無數頂尖學者 87 年來都無法證明正確性的代數幾何難題「雅可比猜想」——不用證 […]

articles.title: Crypto markets rally on Clarity progress report, Asian chip-stock rebound
articles.description: Speculation that President Donald Trump agreed to a crucial ethics provision for the crypto market structure bill underpinned the gains.

articles.title: Bitcoin price gains to $66.3K as range breakout attempt sparks 1-month high
articles.description: Bitcoin beat out local resistance to pass $66,000 amid predictions of as much as 6% BTC price upside if momentum continued.

articles.title: 資料中心「韌性」撲朔迷離難以掌握！Google Cloud 電力故障只影響三項服務
articles.description: Google 雲端近日發生約 15 小時服務中斷，影響範圍集中 europe-west4-a 區域內的 VMw […]

articles.title: 川普關稅戰恐重創加國經濟，加深彼此政治戰略裂痕
articles.description: 美國總統川普最新宣布，將對多類加拿大商品加徵額外 50% 關稅，並於 30 天後生效。專家分析，若新關稅最終全 […]

articles.title: Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else
articles.description: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.
